meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome tutorial hell. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills Setup to Solve Tutorial Hell
content.seo_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome tutorial hell. An advanced-level checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code for rapid SaaS deployment.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell is a cycle of passive consumption that kills revenue. Break it by shifting from 'learning' to 'shipping' using Claude Code and Antigravity. By automating your boilerplate and focusing on business logic, you force your AI to build your MVP while you focus on market validation and monetization.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks watching tutorials, tweaking boilerplate code, and chasing the perfect architecture. Meanwhile, your competitors are shipping features, securing users, and iterating based on real-world feedback. You aren't building a business; you’re building a collection of abandoned GitHub repositories.

The shift from 'coder' to 'founder' requires a radical change in workflow. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you move from manual keystrokes to intent-based development. This setup doesn't just write code—it architects, tests, and deploys your vision while you maintain the high-level focus required to scale your SaaS to profitability.

steps.title: Architecting the Business Logic with Antigravity
steps.description: Stop coding from scratch. Use Antigravity to define your high-level business domain, database schema, and user authentication flow before writing a single line of application code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my SaaS business requirements for a [Project Type] and generate a robust, scalable architecture schema including entity-relationship diagrams and API endpoints.

steps.title: Bootstrapping with Claude Code
steps.description: Initialize your repository using Claude Code to ensure the folder structure aligns with modern SaaS standards, avoiding the 'spaghetti' trap found in basic tutorials.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a project structure for a production-ready Next.js SaaS app with clean architecture patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Generate the project boilerplate following the architected schema defined in the context.'

steps.title: Automating Feature Implementation
steps.description: Transform your product roadmap into actionable code blocks. Use Claude Code to iterate on specific modules while maintaining the integrity of your core business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a secure user authentication flow using NextAuth and Supabase based on the defined database schema.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Implement the authentication module. Ensure type safety and add unit tests for edge cases.'

steps.title: Enforcing Rigorous Testing Cycles
steps.description: Tutorials often ignore testing. A founder cannot afford technical debt. Use Claude Code to generate comprehensive test suites for every feature you ship.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the authentication module and generate a suite of Jest/Playwright tests for critical user paths and security vulnerabilities.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Run tests on the current directory and fix any regressions or linting errors automatically.'

steps.title: Deployment and Revenue Readiness
steps.description: Prepare your app for the real world. Automate the configuration of environment variables, CI/CD pipelines, and Stripe integration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a CI/CD pipeline for Vercel and set up the Stripe webhook handler for subscription billing.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Configure deployment settings and finalize the payment integration layer.'

pro_tips: Treat Claude Code as a junior developer: always provide the architecture context first, never just the task.
Use Antigravity to 'audit' your code every 48 hours to prevent feature creep and maintain focus on your MVP.
Force Claude Code to write tests before implementation to ensure you aren't building features that don't satisfy requirements.
Keep your prompt library in a local Notion database; reuse successful architecture patterns across multiple SaaS projects.
Never accept the first output; ask the AI to 'critique its own solution for scalability and security' before committing.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, focus exclusively on acquiring your first 10 paying customers. Use the feedback loop to iterate your product via Claude Code, treating every customer request as a new prompt.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools to outpace the market and stop the cycle of endless learning. It is time to transform your technical skills into a revenue-generating engine. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
